---
id: create-identity
title: "Register a new identity and provision its virtual account."
description: "Creates an Identity record in PENDING state and asynchronously provisions a Nomba virtual account against it. The response returns immediately with the identity in PENDING state; integrators should either poll GET /identities/{id} or listen for the `identity.activated` webhook to know when the account is ready."
sidebar_label: "Register a new identity and provision its virtual account."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/kobo-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Register a new identity and provision its virtual account."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/identities"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates an Identity record in PENDING state and asynchronously provisions a Nomba virtual account against it. The response returns immediately with the identity in PENDING state; integrators should either poll GET /identities/\{id\} or listen for the `identity.activated` webhook to know when the account is ready.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
